name: @caia/ea-doc-steward
description: EA Documentation Steward sub-agent — auto-files ADRs from approved EA review verdicts, maintains EA Repository freshness, handles supersession (both sides + cycle detection), and keeps INDEX.md files current across decisions/, sign-offs/, and dialogues/. Inherits the existing @caia/ea-architect adr-writer machinery (writeNewAdr / applySupersessions / updateDecisionsIndex) and extends it with supersession-graph validation, scheduled freshness checks, and broader-than-ADR repository updates (lessons-learned, principles, risk-register). Runs synchronously after each Plan Reviewer approval and also on a daily schedule to detect stale ADRs and emit drift alerts.
